stemHtml: What lateral separation is required between two aircraft using the same navigation aid?

options.a: Lateral angle and distance appropriate to the navigation aid in use.
options.b: Diverging courses of more than 15° and 10 NM lateral distance.
options.c: Diverging courses of 45° and 10 NM lateral distance.
options.d: Diverging courses of more than 25° and 15 NM lateral distance.
